text:
Market today: The bond market's reaction to Fed sentiment is the real driver, influencing the tech/chip names that make up most of your portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL is down -38.11%, and SPAL is down -52.96%. Both are leveraged ETFs that decay and amplify losses, especially on margin. SPY and QQQ are also flagged for attention.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AVGO from the scanner list for potential setup validation.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and the broad market signals.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or stopping out given the -38.11% unrealized loss and leveraged decay.
SPAL: Consider trimming or stopping out given the -52.96% unrealized loss and leveraged decay.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
